title: Atmo recyclers running hot in outer hab
detail: Life-support telemetry shows recycler banks on the outer ring working above comfort setpoints. Engineering says it is a weather front in the ducts, not a failure—yet.

title: Power grid reports a telemetry ghost
detail: Dispatch logs a phantom load on a trunk that should be dark. Someone may be bleeding power, or the meters are lying.

title: Sovereign desks whisper about a spread blowout
detail: Inter-sector arbitrage spreads widened overnight. Junior clerks are canceling lunch to re-mark boards before the open crowd arrives.

title: Docking arm maintenance holds one berth
detail: A civilian docking arm is cycling through diagnostics. Traffic control is slotting smaller hulls around it; captains are exchanging colorful opinions on the public band.

title: Recycler drop-off queues stretch two junctions
detail: Residents are stacking reclaim crates in corridors after a bulk delivery clogged the automated intake. Sanitation crews ask for patience—and muscle.

title: Customs sampling backlog at cargo interface
detail: Random inspection lots are backing up; sealed containers are cooling their heels in vacuum sleeves while clerks argue over manifest revisions.

title: Independent couriers float a slowdown rumor
detail: Message runners and pocket-ship pilots are sharing a tip: fuel surcharge tables may change at midnight. Some are refusing new manifests until it clears.

title: Street vendors debate a permit crackdown
detail: Kiosks near the promenade connectors say enforcement is about to tighten on unlicensed displays. Foot traffic is slowing where arguments spill into the walkway.

title: Noncritical water window may shrink
detail: Internal maintenance memos suggest a short ration adjustment during a main-line flush. Official channels have not posted it; rumor is ahead of the tap.

title: Shipyard flash-weld teams face spot inspection
detail: Safety auditors are walking the civilian yards with light meters and glare complaints. A few bays are dark while crews swap to compliant rigs.

title: Ghost listing pings the property exchange
detail: A parcel appears and vanishes from the auction board within seconds. Realty IT blames cache; speculators blame each other.

title: Sector blackout drill scheduled
detail: NanoMegaPlex Security and power ops announce a coordinated dim-cycle exercise. Elevators and bulk doors will prioritize evac routes for one hour.

title: Ore grade benchmarks spark floor chatter
detail: Assayers posted a revised purity floor for bulk ore receipts. Small claimants say the change favors refinery buyers; the board says it favors honesty.

title: Transit caps flash on connector signage
detail: Crowd-capacity banners rolled out on busy spokes. Guides are redirecting tour groups; locals are treating it like a game until it is not.

title: Clinic supply routing shows odd gaps
detail: Volunteer medics report delayed cold-chain toms on a secondary line. Nothing critical yet, but the pattern looks like selective routing, not accident.

title: Salvage tug contract board refreshes
detail: A fresh slate of short-hop salvage gigs posts near the yards. Veterans warn newcomers about hull registries that do not match the beacons.

title: Corridor lighting enters dim conserve cycle
detail: Non-primary connectors are stepping down lux to shed load before peak. Complaints are up; power charts are slightly less angry.

title: Credit kiosk cluster hiccups
detail: Three adjacent terminals threw reconcile errors within minutes. Finance bots say transient; street economists say coordinated test.

title: Station founding loop on public screens
detail: Heritage reels are playing on every other bulkhead display. Gift kiosks are stocked; pickpockets are reportedly enthusiastic.

title: Biometrics calibration drill at cargo locks
detail: Security will run live calibration on hold-space sensors. Expect brief queues and a spike in false positives on cheap cargo seals.

title: Minor industrial solvent band detected
detail: Air sniffers tagged a low-level solvent trace in an industrial sleeve. Ventilation is flushing; crews ask transients to keep masks handy.

title: Claim-jumper gossip at the outfitters
detail: Miners are trading stories about overlapping survey pings on the exchange fringe. Someone always knows someone who saw it first.

title: Freight lifts running behind schedule
detail: Heavy pallets are stacking at sub-deck transfer nodes. Fork crews are on overtime; impatient haulers are offering side deals for priority drops.

title: Maintenance swarm clogs external sensors
detail: A cloud of repair micro-drones is servicing antenna masts. Navigation feeds show harmless clutter; captains still swear the picture lies.

title: Vacuum weld sparks a ledger dispute
detail: Two yards filed conflicting completion timestamps for the same sleeve repair. Billing is frozen until someone admits whose clock was wrong.
